hierarchy_rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tighter leading-none text-zinc-950
hierarchy_rules.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-zinc-950

layout.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. Use p-6, p-8, p-12 for containers. Avoid tight paddings.
layout.dashboard_grid: Control Room Grid. Base: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Gap: gap-6. KPI summary widgets span 1 col. Charts span 2-3 cols. Activity feeds span 1 col vertically.
layout.alignment: Mobile-first responsive. Paragraphs and dense content must be left-aligned. Center alignment only for empty states or standalone generic alerts.
layout.max_width: max-w-7xl mx-auto for general views. Fluid widths (w-full) for the main dashboard content area beside the sidebar.

surfaces_and_micro_themes.dashboard_cards: Flat solid background (bg-white), 1px solid border (border-zinc-200), no shadow by default. On hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1), subtle shadow (shadow-md), border darkens (border-zinc-300).
surfaces_and_micro_themes.top_navigation: Crystal Glassmorphism. bg-white/70 with backdrop-blur-xl. 1px delicate bottom border (border-zinc-200).
surfaces_and_micro_themes.sidebar: Solid flat background (bg-zinc-50), 1px solid right border (border-zinc-200). Active state for links uses bg-zinc-100 and text-zinc-950.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.radius: Minimal. Use rounded-md (6px) or rounded-lg (8px) for cards, inputs, and buttons. Never use excessive rounding.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements must change on hover. Buttons should darken, text should increase in contrast. Use transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out.
motion_and_interactions.entrance_animations: Staggered fade-in-up for lists and grids. Use Framer Motion (initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}).
motion_and_interactions.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. High contrast focus rings (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-zinc-950 focus:ring-offset-2).

components_instructions.buttons: Primary: Solid black (bg-zinc-950 text-white hover:bg-zinc-800). Secondary: Outline (bg-transparent border border-zinc-200 text-zinc-900 hover:bg-zinc-50). Ghost: Transparent (hover:bg-zinc-100 text-zinc-600 hover:text-zinc-950).
components_instructions.inputs_and_forms: Use Shadcn UI. Customize with rounded-md and border-zinc-200. Focus state must use black ring.
components_instructions.tables_and_lists: Go cardless or rectangular dense styles. Use 1px bottom borders for rows. Left-aligned data. Empty states must be clearly designed with an icon and CTA.
components_instructions.data_visualization: Use Shadcn charts (Recharts). Stick to minimalist styles: remove grid lines if possible, use solid zinc or emerald colors for bars/lines.
components_instructions.video_player: Dark minimal container (bg-zinc-950) for the video block to provide contrast and focus. Standard HTML5/React video player with customized minimal controls.
components_instructions.progress_bars: 1px to 4px thin height line. bg-zinc-200 base, bg-emerald-500 fill. Smooth width transitions.

icons_and_assets.usage: Use stroke-width 1.5 or 2 for clarity. Sizes: 16px to 20px generally, 24px for key empty state illustrations.

student_avatar_2.description: Alternate avatar placeholder for student profile.

course_thumbnail_1.description: Minimalist white architecture, to be used as abstract course cover for 'Design Foundations'.

course_thumbnail_2.description: White minimalist building facade, to be used as course cover for 'Advanced Architectures'.

course_thumbnail_3.description: Abstract geometric black and blue, course cover for 'Data Engineering'.

auth_background.description: Abstract composition for login/register page background side-panel.

testing_requirements: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='course-card', data-testid='play-video-button', data-testid='login-submit').
instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the JSON guidelines for color, typography, and spacing.
Do NOT use HTML inputs for complex forms; use Shadcn UI components.
Apply Spanish (es) for all UI text, headings, and dummy content.
Configure Tailwind with the specified color palette and font families.
Build a robust Dashboard layout using the 'Control Room Grid' mode and generous spacing rules.
Use the provided image URLs strictly for media—do NOT use dummy image placeholders.
